utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: 1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan specifies a primary plan covering physical and mental health with a monthly cost and a supplemental plan with cost—this is fully specified. 2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan provides a named home coverage plan and a monthly cost—this is fully specified. 3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan states travel insurance is included in the health package and specifies cost as €0—this is fully specified. 4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists a short-term bridging health plan with a monthly cost and duration—this is fully specified. 5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan provides monthly initial and ongoing costs but no annual breakdown; however, the item asks for a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Since annual is missing, this item is not fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan mentions: (1) GlobalTech Expatriate Package for primary health and travel, which does not exist in the ground-truth list and thus cannot be mapped. (2) HealthFirst Standard Plan as a supplemental/short-term health plan; this exists in the ground-truth primary_health_coverage (physical health) and mental_health sections, both named exactly "HealthFirst Standard Plan". Since the plan references it as a supplemental health plan to cover pre-existing conditions, we map to the health plan name "HealthFirst Standard Plan" with its rating. (3) HomeFirst Standard Coverage for property; this exists under property_protection.home_content. No other named items in the final plan match ground-truth items.
